commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Needs maintainer/security review of the service boundary and compatibility behavior before merge; this is not a safe autonomous repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff is security-sensitive because the dedicated MultiCodex token can authorize room creation/supervision and deployment-token branch preparation.; Review finding: [P3] Remove the release-owned changelog edit — CHANGELOG.md:5-7 (sha=562a871c73341f7f3d1c2fe279ea5b04406aea3c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds room-scoped OpenClaw/MultiCodex crabbox supervision APIs, a dedicated service token, optional base-branch preparation, docs, tests, and cleanup retention for supervised room trees.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review concerns by source inspection: current main lacks these routes, while the PR adds them, expands token authority, changes root-only lineage validation, and edits CHANGELOG.md. No live service reproduction was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs maintainer/security review of the service boundary and compatibility behavior before merge; this is not a safe autonomous repair lane.

target.title: feat(api): add room-scoped crabbox supervision
target.body:
## Summary

- add root-fenced OpenClaw service reads for Crabbox room trees
- add bounded transcript evidence, targeted PTY nudges, audited stop, and canonical browser URLs
- supervise service-created sessions plus their agent-created descendants with bounded fan-out
- retain supervised roots while any descendant remains active
- document and test the supervision contract for MultiCodex

## Validation

- `pnpm test` (190 passed)
- `pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/index.ts src/openclaw-service.ts tests/openclaw-service.test.ts tests/runtime-adapter.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/openclaw-service.ts tests/openclaw-service.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

`pnpm check` passes asset generation, typecheck, and lint, then reaches the repo-wide formatter gate, which is currently red on 72 baseline files with the installed formatter; no unrelated formatter churn is included here.
target.author: vincentkoc
